dict.string: Value stored to 'dataGoodBuffer' during its initialization is never read
Value stored to 'dataGoodBuffer' during its initialization is never read
1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

Call to function 'strcpy' is insecure as it does not provide bounding of the memory buffer. Replace unbounded copy functions with analogous functions that support length arguments such as 'strlcpy'. CWE-119

Call to function 'strcpy' is insecure as it does not provide bounding of the memory buffer. Replace unbounded copy functions with analogous functions that support length arguments such as 'strlcpy'. CWE-119
Value stored to 'dataBadBuffer' during its initialization is never read
Value stored to 'dataBadBuffer' during its initialization is never read
1st function call argument is an uninitialized value
1st function call argument is an uninitialized value

Call to function 'strcpy' is insecure as it does not provide bounding of the memory buffer. Replace unbounded copy functions with analogous functions that support length arguments such as 'strlcpy'. CWE-119

Call to function 'strcpy' is insecure as it does not provide bounding of the memory buffer. Replace unbounded copy functions with analogous functions that support length arguments such as 'strlcpy'. CWE-119

Call to function 'strcpy' is insecure as it does not provide bounding of the memory buffer. Replace unbounded copy functions with analogous functions that support length arguments such as 'strlcpy'. CWE-119
